title: Getting or making changes to a nine-digit business number for importing and exporting - Canada.ca
content:
## Getting or making changes to a nine-digit business number for importing and exporting
Importers, exporters, or customs brokers acting on behalf of their client need a nine-digit business number (BN) before registering for an import-export (RM) program account with the Canada Border Services Agency (CBSA) .
Effective October 21, 2024 , if you need to register for or update an RM program account, go to the CBSA 's CARM: Assess and pay duties and taxes on imported commercial goods .
- Registering for a BN for importing and exporting
- Making changes to a BN for importing and exporting
- Amalgamating and merging of corporations

## Registering for a BN for importing and exporting
- Before you register Make a list of all of your business's names that may appear on customs release forms and documents, such as invoices. Make sure to include all of these business names when you register for a nine-digit BN for importing and exporting. The information that the CBSA has on file must match the customs release document information. If you do not include all your business names when you register, your goods may be delayed at the border.
Make a list of all of your business's names that may appear on customs release forms and documents, such as invoices.
Make sure to include all of these business names when you register for a nine-digit BN for importing and exporting. The information that the CBSA has on file must match the customs release document information. If you do not include all your business names when you register, your goods may be delayed at the border.
- How to register If you don't already have a nine-digit BN , register for one using the appropriate registration method for your type of business: For sole proprietorships or partnerships Register for a BN by using CARM: Assess and pay duties and taxes on imported commercial goods if you don't need to register for any other Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) program account . Register for a BN by using the online service Business Registration Online (BRO) if you need to register for other CRA program accounts . For corporations Incorporated businesses may already have a BN directly from the incorporating authority or the CRA . If you don't know your nine-digit BN , check your options to find an existing business number . For non-resident businesses Register for a BN with the CRA by: calling the non-resident registration and security line : Within Canada or the United States (U.S.) : 1-866-453-0452 Outside Canada or the U.S. , call collect: 1-613-221-3039 Hours of service Monday to Friday 8:30 am to 4:30 pm ET go to How to register For trusts or other types of entity Register for a BN with the CRA by using the online service Business Registration Online (BRO) .
If you don't already have a nine-digit BN , register for one using the appropriate registration method for your type of business:
- For sole proprietorships or partnerships Register for a BN by using CARM: Assess and pay duties and taxes on imported commercial goods if you don't need to register for any other Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) program account . Register for a BN by using the online service Business Registration Online (BRO) if you need to register for other CRA program accounts .
Register for a BN by using CARM: Assess and pay duties and taxes on imported commercial goods if you don't need to register for any other Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) program account .
Register for a BN by using the online service Business Registration Online (BRO) if you need to register for other CRA program accounts .
- For corporations Incorporated businesses may already have a BN directly from the incorporating authority or the CRA . If you don't know your nine-digit BN , check your options to find an existing business number .

- For trusts or other types of entity Register for a BN with the CRA by using the online service Business Registration Online (BRO) .
Register for a BN with the CRA by using the online service Business Registration Online (BRO) .
- After you register Once you have your new nine-digit BN , keep your BN for your own records and register for an RM program account with the CBSA .
Once you have your new nine-digit BN , keep your BN for your own records and register for an RM program account with the CBSA .

## Making changes to a BN for importing and exporting
Choose the situation that applies to you:
Go to the appropriate incorporating authority to update your information before contacting the CRA .
For more information, go to Add or update corporation and director information .
Only the owner of the business can make changes to the BN account.
Call the CRA 's Business enquiries line at 1-800-959-5525 .
Use My Business Account in your CRA account .
Call the CRA 's Business enquiries line at 1-800-959-5525 .
Call the non-resident registration and security line, from Monday to Friday , between 8:30 am and 4:30 pm , at 1-866-453-0452 or, if you are outside Canada or the United States, call collect at 1-613-221-3039 .
Go to Register for or modify an import-export program account .

## Amalgamating and merging of corporations
When two or more corporations amalgamate or merge and create a new corporation:
- the CRA may issue a new BN to the new corporation
- the CBSA will immediately close all RM program accounts you had for the amalgamated and merged corporations
If you need an RM program account for your new nine-digit BN , go to Register for or modify an import-export program account .
